topics.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Redeem Codes — Active Codes, Gift Center Login, and UID
topics.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-17: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: This is a strong existing-page opportunity with substantial impression volume, low CTR, and a clear query cluster around Gift Center intent. The page already has a known backlog history and an established cornerstone role, so an update review is higher value than new content creation. Prior run `2026-05-05-codes-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.
topics.player_value: Improves findability for players searching for redeem codes, Gift Center login, and UID guidance without forcing them through a less relevant page.
topics.duplication_risk: Medium, because Gift Center intent can overlap with other Economy pages if cluster roles are not protected.
claims_to_verify: The page should remain the canonical Gift Center / redeem codes destination.
The existing claims about Gift Center login and UID flow match current canonical site memory.
The update can be made without blurring Economy cluster role separation.
topics.next_step: Send to human review to confirm query intent, protect canonical claims, and define the smallest safe update scope for codes.html.
evidence: GSC page signal: codes.html had 40033 impressions, 733 clicks, 1.83% CTR, avg position 6.01.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center` had 3169 impressions, 121 clicks, 3.82% CTR, position 6.58.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center login` had 903 impressions, 46 clicks, 5.09% CTR, position 5.14.
Low CTR query: `lastz gift center` had 683 impressions, 29 clicks, 4.25% CTR, position 5.96.
Low CTR query: `last-z.com gift center` had 508 impressions, 25 clicks, 4.92% CTR, position 6.00.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z gift center` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `cornerstone-guide` in the `Economy` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-only-redeem-flow`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-rewards-mailbox`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-cluster-role-separation`.
Existing backlog history for this page: gift-center-ctr-pass:done.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

closeout.note: Owner-reviewed no-op proposal. Current codes.html first-screen and metadata already match the intended codes hub role; no content change applied.

topics.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Alliance Duel Guide — Schedule, Day 1–6 Plan, and VS Strategy
topics.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-17: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: The page has meaningful impressions and clicks with a mid-range CTR, suggesting a practical opportunity to improve the first-screen match for schedule-seeking users. It fits the current event-guide archetype and should be reviewed as an existing-page optimization. Prior run `2026-05-10-alliance-duel-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.
topics.player_value: Helps players quickly find event schedule, day-by-day planning, and versus strategy details for the Alliance Duel event.
topics.duplication_risk: Medium, because event intent may be shared with other event pages if the scope is not tightly controlled.
claims_to_verify: The query intent is primarily schedule and strategy related.
The page is the correct canonical event-guide target.
The update will not require scope expansion beyond approved event-guide patterns.
topics.next_step: Have a human reviewer validate whether alliance-duel.html is the best canonical match for the query set and whether the update stays within template and cluster rules.
evidence: GSC page signal: alliance-duel.html had 8912 impressions, 434 clicks, 4.87% CTR, avg position 6.10.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z vs schedule` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `event-guide` in the `Events` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

closeout.note: Owner approved exact Alliance Duel schedule/content intent changes. Manual apply was used for first-screen/meta operations, followed by strict QA.

topics.title: External source opportunity: official Gift Center and store flow validation
topics.notes: The external official domain is a useful discovery and cross-validation signal for Gift Center routing, but it is not proof by itself. The topic is worth human review because it may confirm or refine existing Economy guidance, provided claims are verified before any apply step.
topics.player_value: Could improve accuracy for players trying to confirm official Gift Center setup, UID usage, and store flow.
topics.duplication_risk: High, because this could duplicate existing Gift Center coverage or copy external wording if not tightly controlled.
claims_to_verify: Official service routing details are accurate and current.
Gift Center setup and UID usage are still the correct player flow.
No canonical claims are being copied from the external source.
topics.next_step: Route to human verification only, with explicit requirement for canonical memory plus a second reliable source or owner confirmation before any content proposal.
evidence: Official service domain is the strongest source for Gift Center routing and redeem/store flow validation.
External source URL recorded for later manual verification.
